[[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] '''raided''' the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

The goal was to capture a number of [[Yinchorri attack ship|attack ships]] and [[Yinchorri starfighter|Golden Nyss fighters]] from the Golden Nyss Shipyards.

Yinchorri troops were smuggled in by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]], who fooled the shipyard master, [[Gzin]]. Having captured their ships and blown up the shipyards, the Yinchorri were free to launch their [[Yinchorri Uprising|main offensive]].
